source: documentation repair after fresh validation failure .codewiki/validation/2026-05-16-documentation-fail-task-077.json

exit_criteria: Knowledge captures accepted architecture decisions from feedback build.
Docs distinguish target paths from current frontmatter code_paths so generated state stays green until implementation moves files.
Next loop receives clear planning inputs for source layout/tool lexicon migration.

loop_start.reason: Repair follows persisted fresh validation failure; changes are limited to frontmatter path accuracy.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: A fresh validator should confirm prior failed criteria are fixed before planning consumes this build.

next_loop.reason: Planning compiler should consume this corrected documentation build and current KB files, not chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

requirements.text: Scripts are disposable developer helpers and must not contain or enforce authoritative CodeWiki product policy; source, tests, and gateways must not depend on scripts.
Bootstrap behavior is owned by the CodeWiki skill workflow or a bootstrap sub-skill; source may execute it through application tools, but skill assets own prompts/templates/workflow guidance.
Prompt templates are skill assets, not arbitrary package source assets.
The web surface is a UI under src/ui, not an agent harness adapter under src/adapters.

Domain concepts such as task, roadmap, session queue, build, validation, and state belong in src/domain; application contains compilers, gateways, state engine, and agent-facing tools that use domain concepts.
Remove public project lexicon around claim; use session queue and scoped leases under session/queue instead. Legacy codewiki_claim may remain only as a transitional adapter alias until migration.
Application should expose internal agent-callable tools in src/application/tools so Pi tools, skill helpers, CLI, or future adapters call the same use-case API.

Use application/compilers for feedback, documentation, planning, and implementation compilers; keep validation gateways separate under application/gateways by profile unless later evidence favors colocating them.
Use domain/state and application/state-engine naming; graph is generated representation, not the main domain concept.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Prior validation failure fixed: frontmatter code_paths must not point to nonexistent target dirs before implementation migration.
evidence_mapping.evidence: Python frontmatter scan of .codewiki/kb/**/*.md reports missing 0 after updating affected code_paths to current existing paths.
Target layout and ownership are described in document bodies and diagrams, while frontmatter reflects current implementation paths until migration creates target dirs.

agent_assessment: Fresh validator correctly caught that target code_paths in frontmatter created false implementation claims. Repair keeps docs honest: body text states desired architecture; frontmatter tracks existing code until planning/implementation creates or moves target paths.
summary: Supersedes prior documentation build by fixing frontmatter code_paths to existing implementation paths while preserving target architecture in body text; generated state is green and planning can consume target refactor knowledge.
knowledge_changes: Corrected code_paths for audits, alignment model, change lifecycle, and UI detail docs to current existing paths.
Preserved target source layout and ownership rules in file-structure/API/overview/body text and diagrams.
assumptions: No source files have been moved yet.
open_questions: Planning still must decide exact migration slices and compatibility aliases.

knowledge: Corrected code_paths for audits, alignment model, change lifecycle, and UI detail docs to current existing paths.
Preserved target source layout and ownership rules in file-structure/API/overview/body text and diagrams.
roadmap: Planning compiler should refine or create implementation work to migrate source layout and public tool lexicon.
validation: Frontmatter code_paths scan now reports missing 0.
codewiki_state refresh reports green after fixes.
